h573a2112g2bbdg4471gaba8geba3f717b826: Drinking won't solve your problems. You need a plan.
h3b2e5d91g302ag466bgbd62g8f253b890789: No - I'm staying. You need to learn some manners.
h38e0f308gb160g4da1g9803g276f49b6ed1e: All I need's a way out of this hellhole.
h046717e5gb7a5g43adgbf10g075b37a3b560: How'd you end up here in the first place?
h789f65a3g939dg4b61g8be1gcbe71d3e2057: Not the best place for drinking. How'd you end up here?
h02ed4dd3gd28dg45daga209gd2082a7551bb: Just trying to get the lay of the land.
h8485f0a0gb2beg4988gbe7fg7e9d62878100: Yeah? And how's that workin' out for you? Stuck in this hellhole with the rest of us.
h3a0c7e43g54bbg4deegac57g05a77a144272: I need a stronger drink. And you need to get out of my face.
h0efab816g76b6g4f3cga99ag3f7dee00a981: Talking about your troubles might help.
h9b417aaeg88a2g49e0g9772g61b063b1f8c9: Fine. Plenty more attractive faces around.
h7db1362dge868g4303g821bg4a2b9f56019b: Prayer will help more than any drink.
h69d53876gbbe8g490cga2e2g6f6e24a8d8dc: You should drink to celebrate victory, not to forget your defeats.
h351039a4gc536g46bfg944bg0695fa4224ab: I saved your skin at the gate - least you can do is answer a simple question.
h665b4150gf846g4ac8gbb0dgf9b87ff827cb: You were more fun when you were running from goblins.
h3d6c2b08gb47bg421agb90dg57a05bfa8597: Maybe I could drink with you? A toast to our survival.
ha8c1e557g7b10g497egabbbg60b7747b6075: I ain't toasting to nothing. Half my people are captured or dead.
ha5f11dedg37edg49f5g9cfaga8dcdc5bdfde: I'll leave when you tell me what happened to the First Druid.
h6978edf9g9c14g45b9g9134g9467cf312164: We've got a contract to track down some relic, and he wanted in on the job. Eyes lit up when he heard about it.
h44f687cag08efg4067g86f1g071bf72f8d37: Didn't work out, though. Goblins got him when we were turning tail. He's either diggin' latrines or boilin' in a cookpot by now.
hc1b75cceg5e94g44bcga858ge3bda26645c4: And you just left him to die?
hd5d90077g22f9g4f6dg94ecgfa5dd028cb95: Yeah, and I'd do the same again. He weren't my responsibility.
hac218bc5ge42dg4214g9cfag07a0533d6a47: If you want to play the hero, go ask the goblins nicely, and maybe they'll give you whatever's left of him.
hd09ab63egaa9ag4032g9daeg92cf73bdf11b: All right. I'll leave you to your drinking.
h4dd3bd5cgbf40g4850g87c5g4a37d8f75b8b: I'm not leaving until you tell me exactly what happened to the First Druid.
h74736444g00bbg4313g9998g10c38e617b34: I already told you - he was at the temple ruins with us. But it ain't like we forced him to go along.
habcc0201g7b5fg4557g9217g2db27ca5567b: As soon as he heard we had a contract to find that Nightsong relic, he was more eager than a hound in heat.
h0e89080dg3a94g4346g9782g508fbc9f88ea: When the goblins jumped us, most of my crew scarpered, just like I taught 'em to. The old codger didn't.
h455f6cb2g5c56g49e3gb93ege5a285498f02: And where exactly did you leave him?
ha491ec49g4e47g4e6bg8a50g1f0de12cd856: Gobbos are holed up in the temple ruins out west of here - last I saw Halsin, he was right in the thick of 'em.
hd5f04b44g6543g4b84gaaecg6940306d6b65: If you head that way, you'll likely smell 'em or hear their drums before you see 'em.
hfd4b8c5fg434ag4ca5g9664g6885436d32c5: If it ain't the friendly drow. Thought you were with the goblins when you showed up at the gate.
hbd92d404gaa55g4dfdgb4e5g78173ea0874b: Glad you weren't - you fight well. Not like them bloody tieflings.
h35963d7fg9736g462cga434g175b82a19f78: I think they like you less than they like me. It's almost impressive.
h5a4da368g65a8g432agbf8ag132040173190: I could use some help - is there a healer here?
ha18213dbg9bf1g4fcdg8b23gbf197685a55d: I heard the First Druid left the grove with you. Any truth in that?
h7dc5347ag5e66g4307g87d2g64218d7a82bf: If it ain't the fearless goblin-slayer.
h4c38ab02g6e49g4130g95f9g46817a55e50f: You sure you want to be seen with me? I ain't exactly popular with this lot.
hc9050479gc152g4d60g998aga5c7ac5f3db5: All you did was stand up for your crew. I respect that.
hc402f05dgb534g44d0g949bg19cd32e6f1ea: Half my crew are full of holes.
h4290849egf0e3g49dbgab54ga6490570aade: You could try to be a little friendlier.
h6041d8e8g47c4g493agbef9g2d2f399fac59: Show some respect - I helped at the gates.
h57296794g94f2g4736gb8a5gec77b60eee42: Feck off yourself - I saved your skin back at the gates.
h34989a5fg43fcg41a2g9637g0b461b5e6bd1: Yeah, you really saved the day, swooping in and playing the hero.
hf510921eg8b03g44f4gad3fg3a28674fa026: Now I'm gonna take the blame for leading the goblins here, and losing track of the bloody druid.
h69fbfb83ge849g44e4g887ag11ee965ca65d: Where did the goblins come from?
hdcce818bg73bfg42c3g8eecg6366164271a2: They chased us all the way from the ruins we were poking around in.
ha852a02dgf939g49e6g8ecdgd12db64b94db: And is that where you lost track of the druid you mentioned?
he728b9eeg151fg4b6dga176g57e061737923: Sounds like you were looking for trouble.
h4227d666g55f3g4f9dg9aabgd14a6925dfaf: We was looking for a relic. Had a contract to find it, and the fella who runs this place came along on the job with us.
hf1501fc8gb1fbg453cgb60egad52a953115b: Who's the druid you lost track of?
h565965d1g12d0g461fgae54gf479837f15d4: Halsin. He's the leader around these parts. Or was.
h4847ef59g1d56g4ee7gbae5g33061366061d: Charming. I can see why the locals like you so much.
he55eb9ffg0b4bg4d1cg9279g0a7ad0867801: Them devils ain't local - they're refugees. Fella who runs this place offered 'em shelter.
h34034368g6db5g4830g8c05g15d5b36afca2: I heard you might know where he is.
hbe018194g8bedg4e4eg9e23g8130baa6dab7: Aye. His name's Halsin, and if he's still alive, he'll be cursing the day he laid eyes on me.
hee5f2107g7ae2g4777ga452g813ef2f2b1ee: Can I have a look at that contract?
hcd347cd0g5c92g46c8gb448g1358313a625a: Job's all yours, if you got a death wish.
h5a9a91efgbae1g402dga974ga9ef6693bab9: There's a wizard in Baldur's Gate that'll pay gobloads for a relic, supposedly buried round these parts.
he6e0206bg9050g4fadg8aaagc0c80ef4aeaf: But gold ain't any use if you're too cold to spend it.
h1342ae72g9ef3g428fg8551g398f9589d9ef: Just tell me where to find the relic.
h1da32913gf603g4846gb706ge4e35a5f634a: Any idea what the relic actually is?
h0d5eca2fga43fg424ag8d5egdb475fcda179: If I knew that, I wouldn't be back here with half my crew gone.
h4252f6deg64adg4edag907egc1f32ebb4c1d: But look, if you're itching to meet Kelemvor, I won't stop you.
hdf6d7679gfca5g46e2g8b98ga9852b7c0f80: It's called the Nightsong. Supposed to be hidden under the temple where the goblins jumped us.
h53705b9cgedd0g47d5g9fbbg247a8cca523d: I'd give you the map and wish you a happy funeral, but my mate Brian kept hold of it like his own todger. Goblins made short of the fat old chunk.
h2fd0cadcg3731g41adga06fgfbbbe91cf95b: All I've got's the contract. It'll show you where we turned back, if you feel like dying.
h5cb87123gaedcg47e6g80ccg95c85e2667d1: Heh, don't thank me. I'll be well on my way to Baldur's Gate when you die.
h2ada48cdgf6e5g4e42gab3cg0273a9410fcb: Did you think getting rich would be easy?
h151de754g0dcbg4948g8ed5gd5ecc26d699f: Dunno what I expected. That much gold for some long-lost relic. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
hd310b307g01f9g46eegbb4egf3f62e247285: And from a wizard too. I shoulda known. The gold probably turns to lead the moment you leave Baldur's Gate.
hdf80974cg61c2g422ag856fg57fbc3a93d2e: You ran away from a few goblins?
hf446e1b4gdd0bg4425gb70ag40ec13577867: Wasn't no few goblins, mate. There's an entire hive of 'em. Contract failed to mention that part.
h7971b746g22f6g44d5ga2f2g7f99f4777426: I should speak with that fellow. Do you know where he is?
h494be2d1g4604g46b8gbdafg7a450106c22d: Not my concern. Is there a healer round these parts?
h29287b10g60e1g4f37gba11gae0a03ff902b: You're outta luck. Halsin - druid who runs this place - knew his stuff. But he ain't here anymore.
h5958c44eg41bbg4a9dgaf77g4115aa55df70: Think he's got an apprentice running around somewheres though. Nadine? Natalie? Something like that.
h2c760698g6212g4aedgbc4ega7f34b26b150: I already met her - she says Halsin left the grove with you. Is that true?
hbf24a73cg60dbg410cg93b4ga43469a21a70: Do you have any idea where Halsin went?
h31be2e35gf450g472eg99eag711038e8627f: What are you doing round these parts?
h93de4a77gcc38g49f7gacecg7716104451bc: What's a home for if not for sharing? Who lives here?
hfa0482dcgf105g4d1egaff3gb42bc3896b53: And whose home is this exactly?
h0b98ae90g8ceag45e3ga7e9gefef0baa9768: Druids. And they ain't the friendly type. Only one 'em worth a damn was the leader, and he ain't here anymore.
h4d85e25dg762ag47fdgad33g61ac28f72ab6: Do you have any idea where he is?
h351d68b0g024cg4c33g8e03gaa2361ace91f: What makes you say they're not friendly?
h0cda7e2cg81f0g4ff6gbba0ge2ff1cfc3002: They like trees more than they like people.
h4886855dg4d70g4f68ga837g722becf3d889: You got along with their leader though?
h22a8b944gdacfg4ce0ga560g19416de554a1: You got along with their leader?
hffb9335ag7d9bg43a0gb5c1g3664fde4dea5: Better than the others, but not well enough to risk my neck for him.
hf9dfcdd1g357ag4ca5g9cf8g45edb68d4b63: Devils? Seriously? They're tieflings. Same as me.
h32f56e3eg175fg45d0gabd1gca3cbbe39762: What? You lot come from devils, don't you?
h9b1823b5g5795g47e4ga002gdb41b3221cf4: Bet I could find something nasty in your family tree, too.
hca80b101gc678g4038ga022g6936e28d2790: Fair enough. I ain't tryin' to start the shite with you, anyway. Been a day.
h28a94b5eg66c8g49c2ga251g9934884bdec6: First I lost half my crew in some godsforsaken temple.
h30c32516g5de4g4832gb1c0ge827360d4814: Yeah - it's where I got my good looks. Did you come from a gelatinous ooze?
h6d4ca921g45d7g424bg9b2bg005ef84df5c0: I'm not local either - got a problem with that?
hd622341ag0883g4e42g965eg2e44091a7645: I'm more concerned about the First Druid - heard he left the grove with you?
